title: text tolist

messages.description: pointer to the text if -s flag is used
contents of text as a list

arguments.description: text name if no flags are given

flags.name: -s <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of main structure

body: "text tolist" outputs the entire contents as a list. Semicolons, commas, and dollar signs are output as symbols (and so, if symbols like ", " are encountered, they're escaped with backslashes
